case_title: MENA, EVA et al VS SHITARKMAN, LUDA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENA, EVA ESCOBAR, JOSE MENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHITARKMAN, LUDA NO PROOF THAT NAMED DEFT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR ACTS COMPLAINED OF BY PLTFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID POS AS TO DEFT LUDA SHITARKMAN, NO MAILING DONE ON SUB SERVICE.
